zh.lifeSummary: 當John Rossel於大約1462年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿福時，他的父親Thomas Rossell24歲，母親Agnes Bingham23歲。他於大約1477年與Isabel Babington在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿斯拉可頓享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rossel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Juan, Alvaro, Ana, Carols, Catarino, Guillermo, Javier, Jose, Orlando, Pedro, Ruben.  French Philippe, Yves.  Dutch Gerrit, Flor.
French, Dutch, and Flemish: nickname for a red-haired man, from a diminutive of Old French and Dutch ros ‘red’.
Hispanic: probably an altered form of Catalan   Rossell  .

variants.name: Roessel
meanings: German (Rössel): nickname, or perhaps an occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle High German rossel, a diminutive of ros ‘charger, draft horse’; otherwise a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word, for example Zum weissen Rössl (‘At the Little White Horse’). Compare Rossel .
German (Rössel): habitational name from Rössel in East Prussia. Compare Rossel .
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic; Rössel): from a diminutive of German Ross ‘horse’, one of surnames assigned at random by Austrian clerks.

variants.name: Roszel
meanings: German: archaic variant of   Rossel  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Germany. Compare   Rossell   and   Roszell  .

variants.name: Rozzelle
meanings: Altered form of   Rossel   or   Rossell  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare   Rozzell  .

variants.name: Rossell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Ros(c)el, a diminutive of Rosce (see Ross ). Compare the double diminutive Roscelin, with which Ro(s)cel or Ros(s)el was probably freely interchangeable.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rosel in Calvados.
English: variant of   Russell  , with which the name in 1 above was easily confused.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Rossel was born about 1462, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Rossell, was 24 and his mother, Agnes Bingham, was 23. He married Isabel Babington about 1477, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1509, in Aslacton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

Il a épousé Isabel Babington environ 1477, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1509, à Aslacton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Rosselが約1462年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで生まれた時，父Thomas Rossellは24歳，母Agnes Binghamは23歳であった。約1477年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーでIsabel Babingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクアスラクトンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Rossel(이)가 대략 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쇼버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Rossell(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Bingham(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쇼버에서 Isabel Babington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 아슬라크턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Rossel родился около 1462 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Rossell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Bingham, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Babington около 1477 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1509 г. в местности аслактон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
